channel.title: Futonix — Design · Build · Automation
channel.description: U.S. design-build & automation for healthcare, warehouse, commercial and multifamily — plus the technology behind it.

item.title: Dayco — 400,000 sq ft warehouse telecom & PA control (Nashville, TN)
item.description: Telephone system and PA control engineered across a 400,000 sq ft distribution warehouse.

item.title: Swift Collision — data, access control & facial-recognition security
item.description: Data cabling, access control and top-of-the-line security cameras with facial recognition.

item.title: The Reunion Apartments — historic 80-unit remodel (Tulsa, OK)
item.description: Complete historic remodel of an 80-unit apartment community.
